title: Fixed "subscription_period" docstring
body: Fixed method docstring for "subscription_period". This is a minor documentation tweak to clarify the parameter's meaning in the subscription/payments flow. No code changes were required. The change targets the docstring to ensure alignment with the Telegram Bot API semantics for subscriptions.

step_plan.summary: This PR performs a docstring-only clarification for the subscription_period parameter within Invoice.__init__ to align with Telegram Bot API semantics.

steps.operation: Update docstring for subscription_period in Invoice.__init__
steps.reason: Clarify the subscription_period parameter semantics to match Telegram Bot API documentation; ensures developers understand its value and usage; no code changes.
steps.side_effects: Documentation-only change; no runtime behavior changes. May trigger lint/docs checks and require minor updates to external docs that reference this parameter; existing tests remain unaffected.
